title: Noel 2015 walking full-body action PPS
citation: Noel, J. P., Grivaz, P., Marmaroli, P., Lissek, H., Blanke, O., & Serino, A. (2015). Full body action remapping of peripersonal space: the case of walking. Neuropsychologia, 70, 375-384.
notes: Walking/treadmill PPS expansion profile. Locomotion and optic-flow manipulations are not represented in the current GUI; this profile captures the looming chest-tactile scaffold and extended distance range.

implementation_gaps: exact sound distances and trial counts

provenance.source: PubMed abstract reports standing facilitation around 65-100 cm and walking expansion around 1.66 m.
Current GUI does not encode treadmill or optic-flow condition; those remain protocol-level notes.
